request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Given a prediction-market contract and a single regulatory news record, decide if this record is relevant to whether the contract resolves YES or NO. Score relevance 0-10 (0 = off-topic, 10 = directly determinative). Return JSON matching the schema. one_line_why should be ≤160 chars and explain how this record moves resolution probability.
request.user:
Contract title: Will the Federal Reserve Cut rates by 25bps at their January 2028 meeting?
Resolution criteria: If the Federal Reserve does a Cut of 25bps on January 26, 2028, then the market resolves to Yes.
Conditions:
  A: FOMC 25 bps cut on Jan 26, 2028 — On Jan 26, 2028, the FOMC announces an exact 25 bp reduction in the federal funds rate target range (both bounds down 0.25 pp vs prior), per official Federal Reserve release.
Settlement entities: ['Federal Open Market Committee', 'Federal Reserve System', 'Federal Reserve Board of Governors', 'Jerome Powell', 'Department of the Treasury', 'Bureau of Labor Statistics']

Record title: Economic Fury Targets Iraqi Oil Official, Iran-Backed Terrorist Militias in Iraq
Record date: 2026-05-07
Record regulator: U.S. Department of the Treasury Office of Foreign Assets Control — Office of Foreign Assets Control
Record topic: United States Department of the Treasury
Record entities: ['Ahmed Khudair Maksus Maksus', 'Ali Maarij Al-Bahadly', 'Ali Qasir', 'Asa’ib Ahl Al-Haq', 'Gulf Energy Oil Services Limited', 'Gulf Energy for General Transport and Marine Services and Real Estate Consultancy LLC', 'Gulf General Contracting Limited', 'Hashim Finyan Rahim al-Saraji', 'Iraq International Energy for the Import and Sale for Petroleum Products Limited', 'Kata’ib Hizballah', 'Kata’ib Sayyid Al-Shuhada', 'Laith Al-Khazali', 'Mohammed Issa Kadhim al-Shuwaili', 'Mustafa Hashim Lazim Al-Behadili', 'Office of Foreign Assets Control', 'Salim Ahmed Said', 'Scott Bessent', 'U.S. Department of the Treasury']

response.one_line_why: OFAC sanctions on Iraqi oil-linked entities could tighten supply and nudge oil-driven inflation up, modestly lowering odds of a Jan 26, 2028 Fed 25bp cut; effect is indirect.
